posts.text: The Bloomberg US Leveraged Loan Index has seen average secondary prices fall 10 out of the last 12 sessions and while earnings have looked good, bifurcation has been punitive for an increasing segment of the leveraged universe, leaving the amount of sub-$60 loans at their post-pandemic high. The consequences of the left tail have been on full display – notably in the software space – as the market has begun to treat many of the issuers as they would triple-C issuers.
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: The Trump administration’s order for Anthropic came out of the blue and with little explanation. It sent shockwaves through the AI world and among America’s allies https://www.economist.com/business/2026/06/14/donald-trump-has-cut-off-access-to-the-worlds-best-ai-model?taid=6a2f57f58818300001695a09&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
